ddls:
CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the supplier is active */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the supplier */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed upon with the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the item */,
  "item_code" INTEGER /* Code for the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "item_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item type */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Inventory level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for replenishing the item */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_item_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_type_id") REFERENCES item_types ("item_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales channel */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale after discount */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sale_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_channel_id") REFERENCES sale_channels ("sale_channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in the inventory */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the item is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Minimum inventory threshold for the item */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the inventory level falls below the threshold */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the warehouse */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouses_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales, inventory manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (securely hashed) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "item_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item type */,
  "item_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the item type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the item type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sale_channels" (
  "sale_channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "sale_channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales channel */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the sales channel is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_channel_id")
)
